creator: dereckson@espace-win.org
text:
Yesterday I were really tired to always have to make this "Yes I
accept" comment.

Our bug tracker uses mail as login, and our port infrastructure
doesn't easily allow mail changes.

So since I've I used @gmail.com following a 1 hour mail outage of my
main mail server at the very bad moment, I've always to confirm such
PRs.

It's usually okay but very tiring on the long term.
